#include "xmlrpcpp/XmlRpcSocket.h"
#include "xmlrpcpp/XmlRpcUtil.h"
#include "mock_socket.h"
#include <deque>
#include <string.h>
#include <errno.h>
#include <gtest/gtest.h>

#define EXPECT_PROLOGUE (   name)
Value:
EXPECT_EQ(0, name##_calls) \
<< "Test error; cannont expect " #name " more than once";
